title: Notification - Adding Created Name and Consultant Name to Email
excerpt:
I have a notification that I have setup below. 
Hey {project’s IE}, 
{project’s Name} has been assigned to you. 
When the notification is sent it says: 
Hey {My name}, {project’s IE}, 
{project’s Name} has been assigned …

posts.author: TinaAsh (Tina Ash)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a notification that I have setup below.

Hey {project’s IE},
{project’s Name} has been assigned to you.

When the notification is sent it says:

Hey {My name}, {project’s IE},
{project’s Name} has been assigned to you.

How do I remove my name from the notification as I don’t see it in the email notification that was created.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tina!

When you triggered the notification, did the item that triggered it have you assigned in another People Column besides the project’s IE column?

If so, try removing your name from that column and trigger it again. Let us know how this goes!
